description: Stylish and practical bag from kiara.  Roomy and comfortable to carry, the leather effect fabric and gold coloured eyelets will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 21 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 10 cmMade of synthetic leather for durability with metal eyelets decorating frontHas a front flap fastened with a magnet covering two pouch pocketsOne long detachable, buckled handle for carrying easeZipped pocket on backCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
